mapper.sql: select s.id, s.contract_id as contractId, c.contract_name as contractName, c.channel_id as channelId, ch.channel_name as channelName, c.subject_id as subjectId, es.subject_name as subjectName, c.merchant_no as merchantNo, s.channel_code as channelCode, s.fetch_mode as fetchMode, s.endpoint, s.remote_path as remotePath, s.credential_ref as credentialRef, s.page_mode as pageMode, s.enabled, s.created_at as createTime, s.updated_at as updateTime
mapper.select: select count(1) from payment_channel_bill_source s left join payment_channel_contract c on c.id = s.contract_id and c.tenant_id = s.tenant_id and c.del_flag = 0 left join payment_channel ch on ch.id = c.channel_id and ch.tenant_id = c.tenant_id and ch.del_flag = 0 left join payment_enterprise_subject es on es.id = c.subject_id and es.tenant_id = c.tenant_id and es.del_flag = 0

from payment_channel_bill_source s left join payment_channel_contract c on c.id = s.contract_id and c.tenant_id = s.tenant_id and c.del_flag = 0 left join payment_channel ch on ch.id = c.channel_id and ch.tenant_id = c.tenant_id and ch.del_flag = 0 left join payment_enterprise_subject es on es.id = c.subject_id and es.tenant_id = c.tenant_id and es.del_flag = 0
order by c.contract_name asc, s.fetch_mode asc, s.created_at desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}

from payment_channel_bill_source s left join payment_channel_contract c on c.id = s.contract_id and c.tenant_id = s.tenant_id and c.del_flag = 0 left join payment_channel ch on ch.id = c.channel_id and ch.tenant_id = c.tenant_id and ch.del_flag = 0 left join payment_enterprise_subject es on es.id = c.subject_id and es.tenant_id = c.tenant_id and es.del_flag = 0 where s.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and s.id = #{id} and s.del_flag = 0 limit 1

select s.id, s.contract_id as contractId, s.channel_code as channelCode, s.fetch_mode as fetchMode, s.endpoint, s.remote_path as remotePath, s.credential_ref as credentialRef, s.page_mode as pageMode, s.enabled, s.tenant_id as tenantId, s.created_by as createdBy, s.created_at as createdAt, s.updated_by as updatedBy, s.updated_at as updatedAt, s.del_flag as delFlag from payment_channel_bill_source s join payment_channel_contract c on c.id = s.contract_id and c.tenant_id = s.tenant_id and c.del_flag = 0 and c.status = 1 join payment_channel ch on ch.id = c.channel_id and ch.tenant_id = c.tenant_id and ch.del_flag = 0 and ch.status = 1 where s.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and s.del_flag = 0 and s.enabled = 1 and s.fetch_mode in ('FTP', 'FTPS', 'HTTP') order by s.channel_code asc, s.id asc
